title: Warm up
content: The slide features images of drivers in various cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each city is depicted with different driving environments, suggesting distinct local characteristics.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide introduces the theme 'A Ride Through China,' highlighting the transformation of the nation. It features images of taxis and iconic Chinese locations, suggesting a focus on development and cultural integration.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This slide outlines the investigation and research of city features. It introduces a flow from local features to development strategies and then to outcomes and positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide matches Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou to their respective development strategies. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide provides a perspective on city development strategies. It emphasizes that each city tailors its strategies based on local features for development.
